_comment: Wheel gait-pacing demo (issue #880, drill mode -- one unit, no enemy): a WIDE 80-man Spearmen block at (600,380) facing south is selected, then wheeled right with C. The swing rate is now derived from the OUTER file's own jog gait (UnitManeuver.wheel_gait_rate): the corner man farthest from the hinge jogs his arc at ~1.8 m/s while every inner file slows proportionally, so this wide block takes ~5 s (~300+ ticks) to come 90 degrees around -- visibly stately, the line staying dressed through the whole turn. Before the fix a fixed angular rate swept the same corner man at over twice his own sprint speed. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
